heading_content_part: PRIVACY POLICY MODEL FOR Prayer Times: Azan, Quran, Qibla, Hijri, Tasbeeh APPLICATIONSThis privacy policy governs your use of the software application Prayer Times: Azan, Quran, Qibla, Hijri, Tasbeeh for mobile devices that was created by Developer Company AppSourceHub.

decoder_heading: About App:
ident_heading: About App:
heading_content_part: About App:Follow Your Daily Namaz/Salah schedule properly with Ramadan 2020 app. This app can be use as all in one as its contain2020 Ramadan Calendar, Namaz Prayer Times, Qibla compass, 99 Names of Allah(Asma Al-Husna) , Islamic Calendar or Hijri Calendar, Hijri Date Converter, Ramadan Duasand each day'sSehri Timing and Iftar Timing.

heading_content_part: User Provided InformationUser Provided Information we do not ask any user informations like your name, email address, age, user name, password and other registration information

ident_heading: Automatically Collected Information
heading_content_part: Automatically Collected InformationWe use Admob for ADS. Admob need internet persmission to show ads. It may collect some device informations. We do not use any kind of user information or save it.

decoder_heading: Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?
ident_heading: Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?
heading_content_part: Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?We use GPS permission "android.hardware.location.gps" to get location locally to show accurate prayer times and Qibla distance. This Application does not collect precise information about the location of your mobile device.
